_comment: Staff-approved resolutions (Jul 2026). Applied by build_lny_2026_seed.py after Zeffy/Kenrick merge.

approved_notes.kenrick_only_vendors: Paper-form applications — Kenrick menu is authoritative.

approved_notes.vorwerk-thermomix: Excluded — appliance demo, not food vendor.
approved_notes.d-t-kitchen: Kenrick open-cooking MEV is correct; Zeffy prepack ticket was misapplied.
approved_notes.lizetta-s-sourthern-soul-food: Paper app — menu from lizettassoulfood.com + eglny Food & Beer Garden field list; signatures: fried fish/shrimp, ribs, chicken, jambalaya, hot links; name typo Sourthern corrected.
approved_notes.matcha-drinks-pre: Kenrick description was a product list — canonical name Shibainc Cafe (i801 LLC, ca.shibainc.cafe); booth V01 TFF PRE-PKG.
